LET fQTD = 'If(InQuarterToDate($1, ' & CHR(39) & '$(vMaxDate)' & CHR(39) & ', 0), ' & CHR(39) & 'Yes' & CHR(39) & ', ' & CHR(39) & 'No' & CHR(39) & ')';
LET fYTD = 'If(InYearToDate($1, ' & CHR(39) & '$(vMaxDate)' & CHR(39) & ', 0), ' & CHR(39) & 'Yes' & CHR(39) & ', ' & CHR(39) & 'No' & CHR(39) & ')';
LET fMTDPrevious = 'If(InMonthToDate($1, ' & CHR(39) & '$(vMaxDate)' & CHR(39) & ', -1), ' & CHR(39) & 'Yes' & CHR(39) & ', ' & CHR(39) & 'No' & CHR(39) & ')';
LET fQTDPrevious = 'If(InQuarterToDate($1, ' & CHR(39) & '$(vMaxDate)' & CHR(39) & ', -1), ' & CHR(39) & 'Yes' & CHR(39) & ', ' & CHR(39) & 'No' & CHR(39) & ')';
LET fYTDPrevious = 'If(InYearToDate($1, ' & CHR(39) & '$(vMaxDate)' & CHR(39) & ', -1), ' & CHR(39) & 'Yes' & CHR(39) & ', ' & CHR(39) & 'No' & CHR(39) & ')';
